intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 68%, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% for 5:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 13% done. 61 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 13% done. 61 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 68% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 19% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 19% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 5:00 at 68%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 56 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 19% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 26% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 68% for 5:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 26% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 26% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 5:00 at 68%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 5:00 at 68%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 5:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 39% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 46% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 35 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 46% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 46% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 52% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 68-68% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 52% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 52% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 59% complete. 68% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 48 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 25 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% done. 25 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 48 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 51 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 51 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 22 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22 minutes to go. Easy does it. 68% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 71% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 19 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 54 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% done. 19 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 71% complete. 19 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% complete. 16 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 16 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 57 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 78% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 78% complete. 68% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 78% done. 13 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% for 3:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 82% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 3:00 at 68%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 68% for 3:00. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 86% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 66 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
